MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, not contested, and the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Intervenors CNA and Harbor Insurance Company's Notice of Motion and Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is OFF CALENDAR. Objection filed. No reply filed.

Intervenors' motion is untimely. Trial in this case is set for December 15, 2025. The motion was improperly set for hearing within 30 days of trial in violation of California Code of Civil Procedure section 438(e). Moreover, Intervenors previously sought ex parte relief to specially set this untimely motion, which the Court denied on October 28, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (304/EPS)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 7, 2025, in Department 304, Line 1.

No appearances, not contested, The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Surface Pumps, Inc ("Defendant" or "Surface Pumps") Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Opposition filed. Reply filed.

Plaintiffs' objection to the Declaration of Steve Durrett ("Mr. Durrett"), in its totality is SUSTAINED on the grounds of lack of personal knowledge. (Code Civ. Proc. 437c, subd. (d); LAOSD Asbestos Cases [Ramirez] (2023) 87 Cal.App.5th 939, 947-951 [corporate representative lacked personal knowledge to testify regarding events predating her employment by defendant and could not testify to hearsay].)

Defendant's objection to the Declaration of Ron Kyner, 3-4 ( 1) [ "I recall it was typical for James Brown to wear his dust-covered work clothes home from work at Shell Oil Company between 1969 and 1985." ] is OVERRULED.

Defendant's objections to Exhibit D [May 16, 2002, Deposition of Barry Bradshaw, Gould Pumps Corporate Representative and General Counsel] and Exhibit F [January 8, 2008, Deposition of Bruce Corner, the Person Most Knowledgeable and Custodian of Records for Gould Pumps] is OVERRULED as it does not lack foundation and is admissible on this motion. The testimonies of Mr. Bradshaw and Mr. Corner do have foundation as the Corporate Representative and Person Most Knowledgeable for Gould Pumps.

*Complete tentative ruling has been electronically served to Counsel

Judge: Rochelle C. East Clerk: Johnny Sengmany. Reporter: NOT REPORTED (RCE/206).
